_comment: Non-blind oracle for OPT-IN quote-text grounding (provenance.quote_field). The excerpt kind carries a verbatim quote checked against the cited spans' text; the item kind carries NO quote_field (a paraphrase still passes). Deliberately separate from acme-notes-grounding-session.json so the existing default-off oracle stays byte-untouched.

closed_spans.text: we shipped the release on friday
the budget was approved by the board

candidate_notes.headline: Weekly review
candidate_notes.detail: A neutral note set exercising opt-in quote verification.
